description_long: This kiosk is a compact, modern commercial structure with a predominantly black and white color scheme and a flat roof. The front features a prominent sign with the word 'COFFTEA' and a logo, as well as a wide, checkered-tile entry platform leading up to the main service area. The side walls are solid with minimal fenestration, while the rear and one side have a series of small rectangular windows, providing limited natural light. The interior appears to be partially open, with a counter or partition visible from the exterior. The overall design is sleek and geometric, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The materials suggest a combination of metal, glass, and concrete, suitable for urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern black-and-white kiosk with a flat roof, checkered entry platform, and prominent 'COFFTEA' signage. Features minimal windows and a geometric, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Side view showing a solid black-and-white wall with a horizontal striped partition and no visible signage.
description_view_1: Front view with 'COFFTEA' signage, logo, and a wide checkered-tile entry platform leading to the main service area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a solid wall, a horizontal striped partition, and a glimpse of the interior counter.
description_view_3: Rear view with a series of small rectangular windows and a mostly solid black wall.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign with logo and text ('COFFTEA') on the front panel above the entry platform
attribute_window_presence: multiple small rectangular windows on the rear and one side
attribute_door_configuration: single open entryway at the front, no visible doors
attribute_roof_design: flat roof with slight overhangs, smooth surface, no visible skylights or decorative elements
attribute_architectural_style: modern minimalist with geometric lines and monochrome palette
